maintainer.description: Optional current maintainer label when it differs from author.
maintainer.title: Maintainer

triggers.description: Filename and extension triggers for loading the skill.
triggers.title: Triggers

token_budget.description: Suggested token budget for this skill.
token_budget.title: Token Budget

test_suite_path.description: Repo-relative path to the skill validation suite.
test_suite_path.title: Test Suite Path

always_load.description: Whether the runtime should always include this skill.
always_load.title: Always Load

tool.description: Optional explicit tool family for registry filtering.
tool.title: Tool

trigger_content_patterns.description: Optional content markers for trigger disambiguation.
trigger_content_patterns.title: Trigger Content Patterns

featured.description: Whether this is a curated featured community skill.
featured.title: Featured
